title: Colored Redstone
description: Adds a new Redstone lamps that changes color based on the redstone signal / power level
body:
# 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
This mod is currently being rewritten. This mod page may change in the future.

UPDATE: Not my full focus as I'm working on another new mod & collage (almost done with it I want to be free)

</details>



## This mod includes:

**LED Redstone lamps!**

This lamp makes it so you don't have to stick to 2 colors (that some of you must be bored of lol) and **expands the color spectrum to 15!** ~~MORE COLORS TO YAWN OVER!!!!~~.


![LED Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e9dcb5d266dad3a6e6fe4f750fc2284000c9f1.png)

here's a table to help you:

_**signal strength = color**_

```
15 = white,
14 = light gray,
13 = gray,
12 = brown,
11 = red,
10 = orange,
9  = yellow,
8  = green,
7  = dark green,
6  = cyan,
5  = light blue,
4  = blue,
3  = purple,
2  = magenta,
1  = pink
0  = black //obviously
```

**Dimmable Redstone Lamps**

basically makes it so you can make the lamps... more dim... so yeah...

![Dimmable Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/989337abfba4c326b2b449a9a9f9b732b59976b5.png)

another table (YAAAAAY)

_**signal strength = brightness**_
```
1 to 5   = dark,
5 to 10  = dim,
10 to 15 = normal
```
